signal_title: Atualização da Classificação Indicativa para o Ambiente Digital
risk_rationale: The new Brazilian regulation introduces a new age classification category and expands criteria for digital interactivity, which may require adjustments to TikTok's content moderation and age-gating policies in Brazil. This poses a moderate risk as it can be resolved within a quarter.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: No mature content surfaced to minors
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: New age classification 'Not Recommended for Under 6 Years'
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new regulation requires a more granular age classification system, which may necessitate updates to content filtering mechanisms to comply with 'Not Recommended for Under 6 Years' category.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Screen time management with 60-min default for <18, with bypass code
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The expanded criteria for digital interactivity may require additional controls or adjustments to existing screen time management features to align with new regulatory expectations.

remediations.title: Implement New Age Classification Category
remediations.description: Update content moderation systems to incorporate the new 'Not Recommended for Under 6 Years' classification, ensuring content is appropriately filtered for this age group.
acceptance_criteria: Content for users under 6 is filtered according to new classification

remediations.title: Review and Adjust Screen Time Management Features
remediations.description: Evaluate current screen time management features and adjust them to meet expanded criteria for digital interactivity as per the new regulation.
acceptance_criteria: Screen time management features comply with expanded criteria
User feedback indicates compliance with new standards

business_impact: The introduction of a new age classification and expanded interactivity criteria may require updates to content moderation and user management systems, potentially impacting user experience and operational costs in Brazil.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed review of the new classification requirements
Update content moderation algorithms to include new age category
Adjust screen time management features to align with expanded criteria
